response.overview: When quiet and withdrawn sixteen-year-old Ambrose unexpectedly falls into the orbit of the popular and magnetic Yash, what begins as an unlikely friendship slowly blossoms into something neither of them expected. But as the two grow closer, something strange stirs between them — a connection that feels bigger, older, and more powerful than either can explain. A tender and unsettling coming-of-age story about first love, and the forces that draw two people together against all reason.
response.tagline: Some connections can’t be explained just felt
response.title: The Colour of Yash
